title: Algerian-Style Casabe Flatbread
description: A traditional Algerian flatbread made with casabe, perfect for snacking or as a side dish.

ingredients.name: Optional: Algerian Spice Blend (Cumin, Coriander, Paprika)

instructions: Brush casabe pieces with olive oil and sprinkle with salt.
If desired, add a pinch of Algerian spice blend for extra flavor.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
